No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication or related targets.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course uses Jungian psychology to help students find solutions to life's difficulties, which aligns with promoting mental health and well-being (Target 3.4).
evidence: 本課程將運用榮格心理學輔助敘事理論 (This course will use Jungian psychology to assist narrative theory)
從故事中找到解決生活困境的方案 (find solutions to life's difficulties from stories)

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops vocational skills for the film industry (Target 4.4), fostering creativity and analytical abilities.
evidence: 科目名稱：影視寫作 (Course Name: Film & TV Scriptwriting)
認識業界必備的多種敘事結構 (Understand various narrative structures necessary in the industry)

規劃符合大眾市場的影集 (plan a series that meets the mass market)
